Arshdeep Singh deletes more than 200 posts, including viral Virat Kohli video
description: Arshdeep Singh sparked online speculation after deleting over 200 Instagram posts, including his viral Champions Trophy reel with Virat Kohli, and changing his profile picture without explanation. The move came after several IPL 2026 controversies, including backlash over an alleged racial remark and social media spats. Arshdeep also endured a disappointing season, taking 14 wickets with an economy rate above 10.

Geopolitical tensions and fresh attacks against Iran are impacting market sentiment. While the Reserve Bank of India's interventions are expected to stabilize the currency, ongoing peace talks and oil price fluctuations remain key factors to watch.

TOI Poll: Sooryavanshi voted breakout star; 86% say IPL is too batting-friendly
description: A TOI Online poll reveals Royal Challengers Bengaluru as IPL 2026 playoff favourites, backed by 39% of fans. Young Vaibhav Sooryavanshi emerged as the standout talent, securing 89% of votes for most promising player. Concerns about batting dominance and technology's impact on game flow were also highlighted by a significant majority of respondents.

title: Karnataka power tussle reaches Delhi: Siddaramaiah, DKS hold key meet with Congress top brass
description: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah has been summoned to Delhi for a crucial meeting with the party high command amid ongoing speculation about a leadership transition. While party leaders attribute the visit to routine consultations for upcoming Rajya Sabha and MLC elections, the internal friction between Siddaramaiah and Deputy CM D.K. Shivakumar is expected to be a key discussion point.

description: According to data compiled by Bloomberg, Taiwan’s overall market capitalisation rose to $4.95 trillion as of Monday, while India’s market value declined to $4.92 trillion.

title: 'Is this Tamil Nadu or UP?': Udhayanidhi Stalin, EPS slam TVK govt over rising crime
description: Opposition leaders Udhayanidhi Stalin and Edappadi K Palaniswami have strongly criticized the current government over a surge in crime across Tamil Nadu. They highlighted recent murders and sexual offenses, questioning the administration's handling of law and order and accusing the ruling party of creating a false sense of change amidst escalating violence.

description: US forces struck Iranian missile sites and boats near the Strait of Hormuz. This happened during peace talks aimed at ending a three-month conflict. Iran accused the US of a war crime. Reports mentioned explosions and fatalities on Larak Island. Discussions continue on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and Iran's uranium stockpile.

title: Watch: Sooryavanshi gives Parag an 'awkward' stare after 'hum nahi hai film star' remark
description: A viral airport video of Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag and teenage star Vaibhav Sooryavanshi amused fans after Parag joked, “we're not flim stars!” and Vaibhav reacted with an awkward stare. The clip surfaced after RR reached the IPL 2026 playoffs. Coach Kumar Sangakkara backed Parag’s leadership despite criticism, while Vaibhav said he aims to break Chris Gayle’s T20 record and score 200.

Minnesota Vikings, Dallas Cowboys linked in surprise Linebacker trade rumors
description: Blake Cashman has emerged as a potential trade candidate as the Minnesota Vikings enter the final year of his contract. The Dallas Cowboys have been suggested as a possible landing spot, with analysts believing a Day 3 draft pick could get a deal done. Despite the speculation, Cashman remains one of Minnesota's most productive defenders after recording 144 tackles in 13 games last season, making a trade far from certain.

Blake Lively ‘convinced’ Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce won’t snub her wedding invite
description: Blake Lively is reportedly optimistic that her friendship with Taylor Swift can recover after the Justin Baldoni controversy and settlement. Insiders claim Lively already has a dress prepared for Swift’s future wedding because she believes she will still be invited. The rumors reignited debate online about tension inside Swift’s celebrity circle. While some sources say Taylor remains cautious about her guest list, others believe removing the legal drama could create space for reconciliation between the longtime friends moving forward.

Trinamool claims it was a routine removal of security equipment. Police stated it was a standard official exercise. The incident has sparked speculation.

Tyreek Hill shocks fans with new career move amid NFL free agency silence
description: Free agent wide receiver Tyreek Hill has embraced DJing in Miami while recovering from knee surgery. He finds enjoyment in EDM music. Despite being linked to several teams for several months since his release from the Miami Dolphins, no NFL franchise has signed him as of yet. Hill’s new hobby could potentially enhance his football skills. The incident mirrors the positive impact seen with Bijan Robinson’s DJing experience in 2024.

title: Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: 'We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system'
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

title: CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
description: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.
